notes: Characteristic-uniform Route B for the GAP-QF keystone: proves the universal q-th-root witness using Kaehler differentials and separability of K(E)/K(x_gen), with no per-prime polynomial witnesses. Two generic adjoin-pair-pow lemmas (adjoin_pair_pow_le_adjoin_pair_pow, adjoin_pair_pow_pow_le_adjoin_pair_pow_pow) are potential mathlib candidates. No sorries, no set_option maxHeartbeats.
